title: Psychological horror experience
description: Ever feel like you're being watched? You're probably right. Dwellers, stalkers, and entities can be seen around every corner.
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

**Search tags:** horror, scary, dweller, dwellers, entity, entities, stalker, modpack, psychological horror

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

Tired of trying to play minecraft with horror mods but everything is the same, a bunch of dwellers that just kill you and spawn too much? Then this is the modpack for you. I created this modpack because I was tired of this, and wanted a horrifying experience in which I would be terrified from entities and jumpscares (while still having some dangerous dwellers). This modpack aims to include only (in my opinion) the best horror mods.

This modpack uses essentials mod to allow people to play with their friends, aswell as simple voice chat to use proximity voice chat.

I do not own any of these mods, I only combined them into one modpack, all credit goes to the owners.

All screenshots gotten off curseforge projects and google.
